event: Market Scene at a Roman Arch
description: A busy market scene set beneath and around a massive Roman stone arch. Vendors and shoppers fill the area with market stalls, awnings, and goods spread out on the ground. The arch dominates the composition, with warm golden light filtering through from behind. Figures in various period dress populate the scene, engaged in commerce and conversation. Buildings and structures are visible beyond the arch. The painting captures the everyday life that continues amid ancient monumental architecture.
